title: Feature Request- Permissions per View

posts.author: orshock (Or Shaked)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to have the option to allow only specific users to be able to watch specific Views in my board.

Use case- i have board with many columns which only part of them is relevant to most of the users.
i don’t want them to get confused by views which contains many columns which are irrelevant for them.

Easy (half-way) solution- add an option to make some views available only for admins.
Full solution- Full permission level per view

posts.author: Mons (John Doe )
posts.cookedHtml: This feature would be very helpful – to be able to hide views from users!

posts.author: danid (Dani Drutman)
posts.cookedHtml: @nataliele this is a much needed feature request… is it on the road map?
